career_transition_pathways.title: Health & Public Service → Cyber Security
career_transition_pathways.description: A guided pathway for employees in Health & Public Service who want to transition into Cyber Security roles.

pathway_steps.title: Explore Cyber as a Capability
pathway_steps.objective: Understand what Cyber Security roles involve and how they apply across industries.
recommended_actions: Attend open cyber or technology networking events
Review internal cyber community posts and role profiles

pathway_steps.title: Build Cyber Fundamentals
pathway_steps.objective: Gain baseline cyber knowledge suitable for career transition.
recommended_actions: Complete beginner cyber training
Focus on security fundamentals and terminology

pathway_steps.title: Connect with Cyber Practitioners
pathway_steps.objective: Learn from people already working in cyber roles and understand entry pathways.
recommended_actions: Reach out to cyber community leads
Request informal career conversations

pathway_steps.title: Choose an Entry Cyber Focus Area
pathway_steps.objective: Identify a cyber sub-area aligned to your interests and background.

pathway_steps.title: Prepare for Role Transition
pathway_steps.objective: Position yourself for cyber opportunities.
recommended_actions: Update skills profile with completed training
Discuss transition with your People Lead
Apply for internal cyber roles or shadowing opportunities

success_indicators: Participation in at least one cyber networking event
Career conversation with a cyber practitioner

career_transition_pathways.title: Financial Services → Data & AI
career_transition_pathways.description: A guided pathway for Financial Services employees who want to move into Data & AI roles, leveraging their existing analytical and regulatory knowledge.

pathway_steps.title: Explore Data & AI as a Capability
pathway_steps.objective: Understand what Data & AI roles look like and how financial services experience transfers.
recommended_actions: Attend open Data & AI networking events
Speak with colleagues already in Data & AI

pathway_steps.title: Build Data Foundations
pathway_steps.objective: Develop core data literacy and technical foundations.
recommended_actions: Complete data analytics fundamentals training
Learn Python basics for data work

pathway_steps.title: Connect with Data & AI Practitioners
pathway_steps.objective: Build your network in the Data & AI community and understand career routes.
recommended_actions: Attend the Data & AI Community Connect event
Request a career conversation with the Data & AI Lead

pathway_steps.title: Choose a Data & AI Specialism
pathway_steps.objective: Identify a specialism that aligns with your FS background.

pathway_steps.title: Prepare for Role Transition
pathway_steps.objective: Position yourself for Data & AI opportunities.
recommended_actions: Build a portfolio of data projects or case studies
Discuss internal mobility with your People Lead
Apply for Data & AI roles or cross-capability secondments

success_indicators: Completion of data analytics fundamentals training
Attendance at a Data & AI networking event
Career conversation with a Data & AI practitioner
Basic Python or SQL skills demonstrated

career_transition_pathways.title: Health & Public Service → Digital Engineering
career_transition_pathways.description: A guided pathway for HPS employees looking to build a career in Digital Engineering, drawing on their public sector delivery experience.

pathway_steps.title: Explore Digital Engineering
pathway_steps.objective: Understand the scope of Digital Engineering roles and how public sector experience transfers.
recommended_actions: Attend open Digital Engineering networking events
Review Digital Engineering community resources

pathway_steps.title: Build Digital Engineering Foundations
pathway_steps.objective: Gain foundational skills in Agile delivery and software engineering basics.
recommended_actions: Complete Agile & Scrum fundamentals training
Begin API design and REST fundamentals

pathway_steps.title: Connect with Digital Engineers
pathway_steps.objective: Build a network in Digital Engineering and understand entry roles.
recommended_actions: Attend the HPS to Digital Engineering transition panel
Reach out to Digital Engineering Community Leads

pathway_steps.title: Choose a Digital Engineering Specialism
pathway_steps.objective: Identify a DE sub-area suited to your background and interests.

pathway_steps.title: Prepare for Role Transition
pathway_steps.objective: Position yourself for Digital Engineering opportunities.
recommended_actions: Build a small coding or Agile portfolio
Discuss transition goals with your People Lead
Explore internal Digital Engineering roles and secondments

success_indicators: Completion of Agile or coding fundamentals training
Attendance at a Digital Engineering networking event
Career conversation with a Digital Engineering practitioner

career_transition_pathways.title: Financial Services → Cloud & Infrastructure
career_transition_pathways.description: A guided pathway for Financial Services employees who want to transition into Cloud & Infrastructure roles, leveraging their understanding of regulated, enterprise-scale environments.

pathway_steps.title: Explore Cloud & Infrastructure
pathway_steps.objective: Understand what Cloud & Infrastructure roles involve and how FS knowledge transfers.
recommended_actions: Attend the Cloud & Infrastructure Career Pathways Panel
Review the Cloud community resources and role profiles

pathway_steps.title: Build Cloud Foundations
pathway_steps.objective: Develop core cloud knowledge and technical literacy.
recommended_actions: Complete cloud computing essentials training
Begin AWS Cloud Practitioner preparation

pathway_steps.title: Connect with Cloud Practitioners
pathway_steps.objective: Learn from Cloud & Infrastructure practitioners and understand pathways into the capability.
recommended_actions: Join the Cloud Certification Study Group
Request a career conversation with the Cloud Practice Lead

pathway_steps.title: Choose a Cloud Specialism
pathway_steps.objective: Identify a cloud focus area that builds on your FS background.
focus_areas: Cloud Security & Compliance (relevant to FS regulation)

pathway_steps.title: Prepare for Role Transition
pathway_steps.objective: Position yourself for Cloud & Infrastructure opportunities.
recommended_actions: Obtain an AWS or Azure foundational certification
Discuss transition goals with your People Lead
Explore internal cloud roles, secondments or project opportunities

success_indicators: Attendance at a cloud networking or development event
Career conversation with a Cloud practitioner
